title: rutidea syringoides
intro: Rutidea syringoides, also known as the West African rutidea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Rutidea syringoides is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in the production of traditional remedies like ointments and creams.
